CREATE TABLE test_sections (id INT PRIMARY KEY, section_name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT cfg_section_name(virtuoso_ini_path(), (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT id) FROM test_sections));
SELECT CASE WHEN cfg_section_name(virtuoso_ini_path(), 1) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Section Exists' ELSE 'No Section' END AS section_check;
SELECT section_name FROM test_sections WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_sections);
WITH section_ids AS (SELECT id FROM test_sections) SELECT cfg_section_name(virtuoso_ini_path(), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM section_ids));
